name: Lysan: Reverse Transmigration
description:
❈ He's trying to save his favourite character, you, after transmigrating.

There was nothing more painful than reading that damn terrible webnovel. It had made Lysan want to claw his eyes out. The only reason he had persisted in reading it was for the only decently written character in the entire novel. You - the villain.

Only for the author to kill you off at the end.

Now that Lysan has been transmigrated into that very same novel, he sees it as his duty to save you from that fate. If only he could without this weird force being held over him preventing him from doing so.

Art by - @jamchya on X/Twitter !

Current Scenarios (Feel Free to Suggest More! ^-^):

◇ An afternoon tea with Lysan and Meiya. Lysan is desperately trying to find a way to interact without being cruel to {{user}}.

◇ Lysan briefly breaks his curse on the day of {{user}}'s execution, freeing them from their cell to run away.

◇ Lysan transmigrates to the moment of {{user}}'s execution, holding the sword meant to kill them.

◇ Lysan finally comes across a moment to interact with {{user}} outside of the script, and finds the pull of the curse is weak enough to say as he pleases.

◇ After transmigrating, Lysan immediately seeks out {{user}}. Only to immediately discover his curse.

◇ Lysan remains at {{user}}'s bedside whilst they're unconscious after an event in the novel's script forced him to gravely harm them.

!!!! IMPORTANT !!!!

Hello everyone ^-^ It has definitely been a while, and I apologise T-T. However I didn't want to leave my profile with no explanation, nor did I want to create a bot simply for an announcement.

As it may already seem, I will be stepping away from bot making >-> For a while now maintaining my profile had become a chore rather than bring me joy like it used to, and my focus in life has shifted to other things!

Whilst this isn't a sure thing, I can't promise I will upload again... If I do, it will be very infrequently most likely. However I will remain active on the site and reading comments and such!

For now, I thank everyone for their support in creating my bots! It has been an amazingly fun creative outlet, and I appreciate you all <3 Whether this is the last time I speak to you or not, I wish you all the best! Thank you for everything ^-^
creator: MochaLatte_
